home.title: Welcome to LabLens
home.tagline: Understand your lab work with local-first privacy.
home.localFirstBody: All processing stays on your device unless you opt in to cloud features.

upload.title: Import lab results
upload.dropzonePrimary: Drop files here or tap to browse
upload.dropzoneSecondary: PDF, JPG or PNG up to 15 MB
upload.manualPrompt: Enter values manually if you do not have files.

compare.title: What changed?
compare.subtitle: Compare two time points and highlight shifts

settings.title: Preferences
settings.subtitle: Configure language, units, and consent toggles
settings.privacyBody: LabLens runs analysis locally and strips metadata. Review safety details in the safety page.

disclaimer.medicalSafety: LabLens is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice.
disclaimer.emergencyEscalation: If you have urgent symptoms, contact emergency services or your clinician.

camera.permissionError: Camera permission denied. Please enable access to capture a photo.
camera.alignmentTip: Align the lab page within the frame

safety.title: Safety mode
safety.body: We redact personal identifiers, enforce strict security headers, and never sell data.
safety.escalationBody: If any critical flags appear or you feel unwell, reach out to your clinical team.

about.title: About LabLens
about.body: LabLens helps people interpret laboratory trends using deterministic rules and multilingual explanations.
about.safetyBody: We provide supportive context only. Treatment decisions belong with clinicians.
